goldDistraction.label: Distract the guard with Gold Crowns
goldDistraction.summary: Choose how many Gold Crowns to throw, then roll 0-9. A 0 counts as 10; if the roll total is equal to or less than the thrown Gold Crowns, the guard is distracted.

roll.summary: Break Mindshield and discard the Gold Bracelet. 0 counts as 10; lose END equal to the final total before turning to 63.
